Class ModalListController

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.ModalListController
public class ModalListController extends Object
Standalone modal controller for displaying paginated lists.

This component is reusable across the application:

  • Displays any list with DoublyLinkedList pagination.
  • No knowledge of entity types (uses callbacks for rendering).

DIP: Takes callbacks for rendering rather than depending on concrete types.

SRP: Only responsible for modal UI and pagination logic.

Time Complexity: O(1) per page navigation.

Space Complexity: O(limit) for displayed items.

  • Method Details

    • showModal

      public <T> void showModal(String title, List<T> items, int totalCount, int pageSize, Function<T, javafx.scene.Node> itemRenderer, Runnable onCloseCallback)
      Creates and shows a modal list with pagination.
      Parameters:
      title - Modal title
      items - First page of items to display
      totalCount - Total number of items across all pages
      pageSize - Items per page
      itemRenderer - Callback to render each item as a Node
      onCloseCallback - Called when modal is closed.

    • updateItems

      public <T> void updateItems(List<T> newItems, Function<T, javafx.scene.Node> itemRenderer)
